analysis.btc_price_note: BTC ~$77,530 as of Apr 25 14:00 UTC. Down -0.57% on day, up ~13% in April (best monthly gain in 1 year). Key resistance $79K. Support ~$75K.
sentiment_key_signals: Fear & Greed Index: 46 — third consecutive session below 50, fear zone confirmed
Strategy bought 34,164 BTC for $2.54B — largest purchase since 2024 (bullish structural)
USDT supply up $5B to ~$150B — liquidity backdrop supportive
KelpDAO $292M exploit — DeFi TVL -$14B; altcoins fragile, BTC dominance elevated at 58.1%
Technical: 17 bullish vs 12 bearish indicators; RSI 62.22 neutral
Open interest dropping — cooling momentum, consolidation phase confirmed
FOMC Apr 28-29 — pre-event vol compression, market in wait-and-see mode
CPI May 12, PPI May 13 — no major macro releases in next 24h
analysis.macro_backdrop: No major US macro data scheduled Apr 25. FOMC Apr 28-29 is next key risk event — rate hold widely expected but hawkish tone risk remains (sticky CPI >3%). GDP Q1 advance + PCE due Apr 30. Iran ceasefire extended but fragile. CPI/PPI not until May 12-13.
analysis.regime_rationale: Neutral (0.40): April monthly performance is structurally bullish (+13%) driven by institutional buying (Strategy $2.54B, ETF inflows). However, intraday price is flat/slightly negative, F&G index at 46 (fear zone), open interest falling, and FOMC in 3 days is suppressing directional conviction. Confidence 0.40 — below 0.50 threshold so macro filter is INACTIVE (bot trades freely). Mixed signals with no clear catalyst in next 24h.
